title: Nenachapadi Nenachapadi Lyrics Kadhalar Dhinam
stanzas: <div>Nenachapadi Nenachapadi Song Lyrics Kadhalar Dhinam

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
mappila amainjathadi

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
mappila amainjathadi
unakkena pirandhavano
uyirudan kalandhaano
unakkena pirandhaano
uyirudan kalandhaano

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
manapponnu amainjathadi
unakkena pirandhalo
uyirudan kalandhaalo
unakkena pirandhalo
uyirudan kalandhaalo

en tholgale thottam endru
ennaalume thoththi kollum
kaatrallava nee en kannae

kalyana naalil maalai kolla
kannaalanin poonjolai sella
andha vanam nandhavanam aagum.

marudhaani kolam pottu
mani kaiyil valaiyal potu
indha rojavukku roja poo
ne soottu. (2)

un kanvan naalai
thaan varavendum.
uyir kadhal nenjaye
thara vendum.

mana pandhal thoranam
naan poda
manavaalanodu un
kai kooda.
un thandhai ullam
thaan oonjal aada.

kadhal enum sollai
naanum sollavilllai
solla vandha neram
kadhal endhan kaiyil illai.(2)

vazhvu thandha vallal
vaangi kondu poga
vazhthu solla naanum
vandhen kangal eeramaaga

endrum enadhu kannile
un bimbam.
unai enni vazhvathe
en inbam (2)

ingu nee sirikka
naan paarthaale
en kadhal vazhum.
nee vazhga nalamaaga
nee vazhga nalamaaga

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
mappila amainjathadi
unakkena pirandhavano
uyirudan kalandhaano
unakkena pirandhaano
uyirudan kalandhaano

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
manapponnu amainjathadi
unakkena pirandhalo
uyirudan kalandhaalo
unakkena pirandhalo
uyirudan kalandhaalo

alli vizhi oaram
manjanathai theetti
andhi vannam pinnal
meedhu thazhi malar sootti(2)

aadhi mudhal andham
aabaram pootti
annam ival maedai vandhal
minnal mugam kaatti

ketti melam kottida
manapennai thottu
thaali kattinaan maapillai. (2)

indha aezhai nenjamum
nee vazha endrum
pookkal thoovum.
nee vazhga nalamaaga

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
mappila amainjathadi
unakkena pirandhavano
uyirudan kalandhaano
unakkena pirandhaano
uyirudan kalandhaano

Nenachapadi nenachapadi
manapponnu amainjathadi
unakkena pirandhalo
uyirudan kalandhaalo
unakkena pirandhalo
uyirudan kalandhaalo

marudhaani kolam pottu
mani kaiyil valaiyal potu
indha rojavukku
roja poo ne soottu. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and connection, reflecting the emotions of longing and togetherness.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Kadhalar Dhinam, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the romantic bond between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Srinivas and composed by AR Rahman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 9, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nenachapadi Nenachapadi, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions of love and yearning, beautifully encapsulated through the poignant lyrics of Vairamuthu. The song serves as a backdrop to a significant moment in Kadhalar Dhinam, where the depth of the characters' feelings is brought to life. With AR Rahman's enchanting composition and Srinivas's soulful rendition, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. This melody remains a cherished favorite for lovers and romantics alike.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nenachapadi Nenachapadi from the Kadhalar Dhinam soundtrack is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voice of Srinivas and the enchanting composition by AR Rahman, this song transports listeners to a world of emotions. The poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu add depth, making it a timeless classic that resonates with every heart.
stanzaMeanings: Thinking about it, thinking about it, the groom is calm.
Thinking about it, thinking about it, did you come into this world with my life connected to yours?
Thinking about it, thinking about it, the beloved is calm. Did you come into this world with my life connected to yours?
My heart's garden will bloom, and the wind will carry it to you, my eyes.
On the wedding day, the garland will be placed, and the beautiful flowers will be offered, turning this place into a paradise.
With a beautiful look, I will wear a ring in my hand, and for this day, you will be the flower.
Your arrival must be tomorrow. My heart's love must be given.
I will go with the wedding decorations, holding your hand. Your father's heart will swing.
I have not spoken about love, even when love came to me, it was not in my hands.
I have come to say goodbye to the one who gave life, with my eyes wide open.
Always in my eyes is your reflection. Thinking of you brings me joy.
Here, if you smile, my love will live. May you live well, may you live well.
Thinking about it, thinking about it, the beloved is calm. Did you come into this world with my life connected to yours?
Thinking about it, thinking about it, the beloved is calm. Did you come into this world with my life connected to yours?
With beautiful eyes, I will sprinkle flowers on the evening sky.
From the beginning, wearing beautiful ornaments, when she arrives, she shows her lightning face.
Playing the drum, the groom ties the sacred thread.
This loving heart will always bloom. May you live well.
